zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes de Garlende於大約1095年出生在法國努維勒-阿吉泰培列內-阿特藍可斯加利艾德-蒙德巴特時，她的父親Anselm De Garlende27歲，母親Beatrice de Montlhery21歲。她於1118年與Amaury de Montfort II在法國結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1143年在法國i萊-德-福朗斯瑟-吉馬內享年49歲，埋葬在法國皮卡迪艾斯布萊。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes de Garlende于大约1095年出生在法国努維勒-阿吉泰培列內-阿特藍可斯加利艾德-蒙德巴特时，她的父亲Anselm De Garlende27岁，母亲Beatrice de Montlhery21岁。她于1118年与Amaury de Montfort II在法国结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1143年在法国i萊-德-福朗斯瑟-吉馬內享年49岁，埋葬在法国皮卡迪艾斯布萊。

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes de Garlende was born about 1095, in Garlède-Mondebat, Pyrénées-Atlantiques, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, her father, Anselm De Garlende, was 27 and her mother, Beatrice de Montlhery, was 21. She married Amaury de Montfort II in 1118, in France. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1143, in Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, France, at the age of 49, and was buried in Braine, Aisne, Picardie, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes de Garlende est née environ 1095, à Garlède-Mondebat, Pyrénées-Atlantiques, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, son père, Anselm De Garlende, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Beatrice de Montlhery, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Amaury de Montfort II en 1118, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1143, à Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, France, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterrée à Braine, Aisne, Picardie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes de Garlende um 1095 in Garlède-Mondebat, Pyrénées-Atlantiques, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Anselm De Garlende 27 und ihre Mutter Beatrice de Montlhery 21. Sie hat 1118 in Frankreich Amaury de Montfort II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1143 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, Frankreich und wurde in Braine, Aisne, Picardie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes de Garlende è nata il circa 1095 nel Garlède-Mondebat, Pyrénées-Atlantiques, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, sua padre, Anselm De Garlende, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Beatrice de Montlhery, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Amaury de Montfort II nel 1118, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1143, nel Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, Francia, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolta a Braine, Aisne, Picardie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes de Garlendeが約1095年にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインプイルeンeエス-アトランティクスガールeデ-モンデバトで生まれた時，父Anselm De Garlendeは27歳，母Beatrice de Montlheryは21歳であった。1118年にフランスでAmaury de Montfort IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1143年にフランスiレ-デ-フランスセアイネ-エト-マルンで49歳で死去し，フランスピカーディエイスンブレアインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes de Garlende(이)가 대략 1095년 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 p이ee스-앳랜티크스 가e데-몽바트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Anselm De Garlende(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrice de Montlhery(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1118년 프랑스에서 Amaury de Montfort II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1143년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 세이인-트-마니에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 피카디 아이스니 브레이인에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes de Garlende nasceu aproximadamente 1095, em Garlède-Mondebat, Pyrénées-Atlantiques, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França, seu pai, Anselm De Garlende, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice de Montlhery, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Amaury de Montfort II em 1118, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1143, em Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, França, com 49 anos, e foi sepultada em Braine, Aisne, Picardie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes de Garlende родилась около 1095 г. в местности гарлeде-мондебат, пирeнeес-атлантикуесь, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция, её отцу по имени Anselm De Garlende было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrice de Montlhery, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Amaury de Montfort II в 1118 г. в местности Франция. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1143 г. в местности сине-ет-марн, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 49 лет и была похоронена в местности бреаин, эисн, пикарди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes de Garlende nació aproximadamente 1095, en Garlède-Mondebat, Pyrénées-Atlantiques, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, su papá, Anselm De Garlende, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Beatrice de Montlhery, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Amaury de Montfort II en 1118, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1143, en Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultada en Braine, Aisne, Picardie, Francia.
